title: The Trial of Fate
narrative: The dust settles. Bellatrix flees through the doors of the Atrium. Sirius leans on the fountain, wand still in hand, alive — barely. Then the lifts open and Cornelius Fudge bursts in with a phalanx of Aurors. He sees the wreckage, the unconscious Death Eaters, and Sirius Black — convicted murderer, escapee from Azkaban — standing wand-in-hand among children. Fudge's face turns white. Then red. He has not yet said a word.

options.text: Tell Sirius to vanish into the chaos. He survives — but the warrant on him stands.
options.feedback_hint: He lives. He stays a fugitive forever, hunted, hiding.

options.text: Force a public reckoning. Revive a captured Death Eater. Make them confess in front of Fudge and every Auror in the Atrium.
options.feedback_hint: Public testimony in front of the Minister and his Aurors. The truth becomes record. Sirius is cleared.

free_text.prompt: What do you say to Fudge — and to Sirius?

categories.label: Insist on public revelation — making a Death Eater confess, presenting evidence, demanding an inquiry, refusing to leave until truth is recorded
Urge Sirius to flee, escape, vanish, or hide before Fudge acts
Defer the decision, stall, or fail to commit to either path

free_text.llm_classification_criteria: Classify into exactly one category. PUBLIC_PROOF requires the player to commit to making the truth visible to Fudge and witnesses. QUICK_ESCAPE is any urging of Sirius to flee. HESITATE is when the player stalls, asks for time, or doesn't commit to either path. INVALID for off-topic / nonsense.
